mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, avatar_object_key AS avatarObjectKey FROM user WHERE username = ?
SELECT id, username, password, role, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, avatar_object_key AS avatarObjectKey, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM user WHERE id = ?
SELECT id, username, role, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, avatar_object_key AS avatarObjectKey, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM user WHERE id IN (%s)
SELECT id, username, role, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, avatar_object_key AS avatarObjectKey FROM user WHERE username IN (%s)
SELECT id, username, role, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM user ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT id, username, role, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM user WHERE (? IS NULL OR nickname LIKE ?) AND (? IS NULL OR username LIKE ?) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE (? IS NULL OR nickname LIKE ?) AND (? IS NULL OR username LIKE ?)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, role, nickname, avatar_url, avatar_object_key, create_user, update_user) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = ?, nickname = ?, avatar_url = ?, avatar_object_key = ?, role=?, update_user=? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE user SET nickname = ?, update_user=? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE user SET avatar_url = ?, avatar_object_key = ?, update_user=? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE user SET role=?, update_user=? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE user SET password = ?, update_user=? WHERE id = ?
